TradeSignal.title: TradeSignal
TradeSignal.description: A trading signal generated by the AI or simulated.

confidence.description: The confidence level of the signal (0-100).

strategy.description: The strategy used for the signal.

executionSeconds.description: The recommended execution timing in seconds.

timestamp.description: The timestamp when the signal was generated.

userId.description: The ID of the user who generated the signal.

AutoTradeSettings.title: AutoTradeSettings
AutoTradeSettings.description: Settings for the auto trade feature.

tradeAmount.description: The amount to trade per signal.

maxDailyTrades.description: The maximum number of trades per day.

minConfidence.description: The minimum confidence required to execute a trade.

userId.description: The ID of the user these settings belong to.

autoTradeSettings/{userId}.description: Stores auto trade settings per user.
